Package org.saidone.model.dto

package org.saidone.model.dto
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.saidone.model
     
    org.saidone.model.alfresco
     
    org.saidone.model.entity
     
    org.saidone.model.mapper
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AuditEntryDto
    DTO representing a single audit entry returned by API/services.
    CorruptedNodeDto
    Tracks nodes that failed integrity checks and may require remediation/retry.
    EntryDto
    Simple wrapper used when communicating with the Alfresco public API where responses are typically wrapped inside an entry JSON object.
    IntegritySweepRunDto
    Stores the summary of a single integrity sweep execution.
    NodeContentDto
    Base class containing minimal information about node binary content.
    NodeContentInfoDto
    Metadata describing the archived content of a node.
    NodeContentStreamDto
    Descriptor representing a node's binary data as an InputStream along with its length.
    NodeWrapperDto
    Data transfer object carrying an Alfresco Node serialized as JSON together with vault metadata.
    SystemSearchRequestDto
    DTO used for invoking the Alfresco System API search endpoint.
